text: The Map Phase is your primary structural view. Let's make sure we are on the Map Phase.
Nodes represent data objects. Want to edit one? Let's open the Inspector.
The Inspector allows you to modify properties, add structural children, or delete nodes.
To add a node, we first need to open the main tools menu.

conditionText.text: Your main tools menu is already open! Let's use it to add a node.

onEnter: const tb = document.getElementById('top-toolbar'); if(tb && tb.classList.contains('hidden')) { tb.classList.remove('hidden'); tb.classList.add('flex'); }
text: You can add a brand new unconnected node using the 'Add Node' button in the toolbar.
Let's close the inspector for now.
